---
title: "Invasive crayfish and disease-host ecology"
---

# Invasive crayfish and disease-host ecology

Examining how a novel invasive predator may alter snail host populations and overlap with freshwater disease landscapes.

## Project angle

This work connects invasive species, predator-prey relationships, freshwater community change, and schistosomiasis host ecology.

## Methods and outputs

- Field-informed ecological models
- Predator-prey impact analysis
- Habitat suitability and spread mapping
- Overlap with disease-host systems

## Publications / outputs

- Temperature affects predation of schistosome-competent snails by a novel invader, the marbled crayfish *Procambarus virginalis*. Faiad et al. PLOS One, 2023.
